findings.message: Plan schema_version must be 0.1.
Plan must be ready.
Plan must keep max tick at or below two minutes.
Plan must keep checkup interval at or below three minutes.
Plan must avoid idle wait between tasks.
Plan must not read private content by default.
Plan must not run private inventory by default.
Plan must not run OCR by default.
Plan must not create embeddings by default.
Plan must not run fine-tuning by default.
Plan must not execute local workers by default.
Plan must not install or download by default.
Plan must keep public-ready at 0.
Start sequence must include live GitHub watchlist.
Start sequence must include GitHub fixture skeletons.
Start sequence must include GitHub promotion matrix.
Start sequence must include GitHub fixture payloads.
Start sequence must include GitHub fixture payload smoke.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker integration signal bridge.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker adapter boundary contract.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker adapter boundary negative fixtures.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker runtime batch readiness plan.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker runtime rollback/redaction fixtures.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker runtime apply guard.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker runtime log-redaction negative fixtures.
Start sequence must include GitHub worker runtime batch manifest draft.
Start sequence must include local worker fixture-chain task pack.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation output smoke.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation output adapter plan.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation output validator.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation output validator fixtures.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation launch dry run.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation launch owner card.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation launch apply guard.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation launch apply guard smoke.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation launch runbook checkpoint.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation launch execution envelope.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation post-output intake review.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation human/overseer review decision card.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation conversion plan preview.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation conversion apply guard.
Start sequence must include local worker innovation conversion evidence ledger.
Start sequence must include Codex morning routine run.
Start sequence must include Codex morning routine run check.
Start sequence must include owner unlock checkpoint.
Path A must validate owner replies.
Path A must dry-run owner replies before activation.
Path A must include source-root activation preflight.
Path B must include live_innovation_scout.
Path B must include guard_cleanup.
Path B must include orbit_visibility.
Path B must include owner_review_packet.
Path B must include handoff_and_push.
